mapper.insert: insert into `article`(id, title, img, description, time, user_id, content, views) values (#{id}, #{title}, #{img}, #{description}, #{time}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{views})
mapper.update: update `article` set title = #{title}, img = #{img}, description = #{description}, time = #{time}, user_id = #{userId}, content = #{content}, views = #{views} where id = #{id}
